items.visual_description: A short, pleated skirt in an off-white or cream color. It features a wide, white elasticated waistband with a prominent horizontal stripe pattern of green and red, reminiscent of the Gucci web stripe. The skirt is made of a fabric with a slight texture and has numerous sharp, vertical pleats creating an A-line silhouette.

overall_description: This is a sporty and stylish off-white pleated mini skirt, likely inspired by tennis wear. The design is defined by its clean pleats and a distinctive elastic waistband featuring a green and red stripe detail, providing both comfort and a signature branding element.
